backend/main.mo: Motoko backend actor defining a Lead type and providing submitLead and getLeads functions to store and retrieve lead form submissions in a List.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features (hero, problem, what we do, why microhub, how it works sections) to their corresponding files, components, and test IDs with high confidence ratings.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of all frontend files describing each component's purpose, from Hero and form components to hooks, styling, and SEO-optimized HTML entry point.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light and dark themes using OKLCH color space, defining design tokens for backgrounds, foregrounds, borders, and chart colors.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with comprehensive SEO meta tags, Open Graph/Twitter cards, and structured JSON-LD schema for local business targeting Mumbai's influencer marketing market.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root application component that composes all page sections (Hero, Problem, WhatWeDo, WhyMicrohub, HowItWorks, Creator, Testimonials, ContactForm, Footer, SocialIntegrations) into a single-page layout.
frontend/src/components/ContactForm.tsx: Lead capture form component with five fields (name, brand, budget, contact, email), form validation, backend submission via useSubmitLead hook, loading states, and success confirmation screen.
frontend/src/components/CreatorSection.t: Creator recruitment section with headline, benefits grid, and CTA button that scrolls to contact form, featuring scroll animations and gradient background.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Footer component displaying Microhub branding, Mumbai skyline background, contact information (address, email, phone), social media links (Instagram, LinkedIn), quick navigation links, and copyright notice.
frontend/src/components/Hero.tsx: Hero section component with full-screen background image, animated headline promoting micro/nano influencer marketing, CTA buttons for brands and creators, and a scroll indicator animation.
frontend/src/components/HowItWorks.tsx: Four-step process section explaining the campaign workflow from brand goals to performance tracking, with animated cards and connecting lines between steps.
frontend/src/components/ProblemSection.t: Problem-solution section highlighting four traditional marketing pain points (expensive ads, low engagement, fake reach, poor ROI) and introducing Microhub as the solution with micro/nano influencers.
frontend/src/components/SocialIntegratio: Fixed floating WhatsApp button component positioned at bottom-right that opens a pre-filled WhatsApp chat with the business number.
frontend/src/components/Testimonials.tsx: Testimonials section displaying four reviews from brands and creators in a grid layout with animated cards, quotes, and user details.
frontend/src/components/WhatWeDo.tsx: Services section showcasing four core offerings (influencer matchmaking, barter/paid campaigns, content-driven exposure, campaign strategy) in animated cards with icons and descriptions.
frontend/src/components/WhyMicrohub.tsx: React component displaying four key benefits of Microhub (micro/nano creators focus, real engagement, Mumbai targeting, affordability) in an animated grid layout with icons and scroll-triggered animations.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom React hook that manages the ICP backend actor instance, creating authenticated or anonymous actors based on Internet Identity state and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Comprehensive React context and hooks for Internet Identity authentication, managing login state, identity persistence, and AuthClient lifecycle with configurable options.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: React Query mutation hook for submitting lead form data (name, brand, budget, contact, email) to the backend actor with automatic query invalidation on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useScrollAnimation.ts: Custom hook using IntersectionObserver to trigger visibility state for scroll-based animations, respecting user's reduced motion preferences.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom OKLCH color variables for light/dark themes, featuring electric blue accent color, and base styles for typography and accessibility.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query client and Internet Identity provider wrappers around the main App component.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind configuration extending the theme with custom OKLCH color system, container settings, animations, and plugins for typography and container queries.
project_state.json: Project metadata defining Microhub as a Mumbai-based influencer marketing platform with premium minimal design, listing architectural notes, required images, and implemented features targeting brand owners.
